_comment: Customization manifest for CocoScrapers. Each entry specifies which addon and version the customization targets.

patches._comment: Example patch entry — remove the leading underscore to activate
patches._description: Example patch that fixes scraper timeout handling

config._comment: Example config override — remove the leading underscore to activate

modules._comment: Example module addition — remove the leading underscore to activate

fixes._comment: Example text-replacement fix — remove the leading underscore to activate
